text:
Fans have called for superstar Snoop Dogg to become the new mascot of the 2024 Paris Olympics.

The iconic rapper was recently named a special correspondent for NBC and has cheered on Team USA in a patriotic ensemble.

Underneath his American flag jacket, Snoop Dogg donned a T-shirt with the face of gymnastics legend Simone Biles printed on it.





A post shared by snoopdogg (@snoopdogg)



The rapper was caught looking in awe at Biles’ performance, lifting his sunglasses to reveal a wide-eyed look.

Simone earned a 15.300 score between her two vaults and also finished Sunday atop the overall leaderboard with a score of 59.566.

A star-studded crowd attended Biles’s Olympic return, including Tom Cruise, Jessica Chastain, Greta Gerwig, Ariana Grande, Cynthia Erivo, John Legend, Chrissy Teigen, Nick Jonas, and Anna Wintour.



Snoop Dogg was also caught celebrating the USA Olympic gymnastics team from the crowd as he sat with athlete Jordan Chiles’s family.

Snoop was captured dancing with the team across the stadium in a full USA-themed tracksuit.

Fans flooded the comments to praise the star.

One wrote, “New Mascot. He has killed it for America.”



Snoop Dogg, whose real name is Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr., has been keeping busy during his time in Paris for the 2024 Summer Olympics.

Earlier on Saturday, the rapper witnessed Team USA swimmers take home the gold during the men’s 4×100 freestyle relay.

During the NBC broadcast, cameras panned to show the star’s reaction to the big win, as Australia came in second place.



He could be seen on his feet in the stands next to swimmer Caeleb Dressel’s wife and threw his arm out while calling out, “One, two, three, gold, gold, gold!”

The music artist also took on a big role on Friday during the Opening Ceremony and was one of the individuals who had the chance to carry the Olympic torch in Paris.

title: Fans call for this superstar to become the new mascot of the 2024 Paris Olympics | Goss.ie
